purpose: GitHub-tracked metadata for visual crops whose binary files are R2 derived assets.
source: raw/sources/Cámara de Senadores de la Nación, 1936.pdf
no_visual_regions_reason: No substantial visuals like portraits, headshots, group photographs, labeled photographs, substantial maps, large illustrations, or source-meaningful diagrams/charts. Stamps and handwritten marks are minor and described in the transcription.
